revision.comment: add random, topic filter, help
1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
Adding [[Category:bump-01-18]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
categorizing unused categories
revision.text:
{{Monthly clean-up category}}[[Category:Unused categories]] {{align|center|{{resbox|'''{{large|{{Random page in category}}[[Category:Unused categories]]}}[[Category:Unused categories]]'''}}[[Category:Unused categories]]}}[[Category:Unused categories]] {{Filter category by topic}}[[Category:Unused categories]] *'''Please help improve an article in this category by adding [[WP:REFB|references]] to [[WP:Reliable sources|reliable sources]] that [[WP:V|verify]] content within the article. Once reliable sources references have been added the unreferenced tag can be removed.'''
[[Category:Unused categories]][[Category:bump-01-18]]

revision.comment: Bot: create page with logs & add-Category lines
revision.text:
add Category:1 member)
* 03:15, 18 May 2025 Immanuelle delete Bot: delete unused Tier-0 category * 21:34, 10 May 2025 Immanuelle create Bot: create automatic enwiki redirect * 08:56, 4 May 2025 Immanuelle delete Bot: delete empty orphan category * 09:39, 31 December 2024 Immanuelle upload Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from [[Category:Log added categories]]
